name: vapor-framework-benchmark
description: Orchestrator for framework comparison benchmark (Svelte 5, Vue 3.5, Vue Vapor, SolidJS)

scripts.setup: bun install --cwd svelte && bun install --cwd vue-3.5 && bun install --cwd vue-vapor --legacy-peer-deps && bun install --cwd solidjs && bun install --cwd benchmark
